description: Custom BMad Method workflow variants by HBLAB. Expansion module — requires BMM.
Phase 1 Analysis coordinator. Guides requirements elicitation, glossary creation, and business flow mapping.
Generate D-02 Requirements Specification with REQ-xxx IDs for waterfall lifecycle.
Generate D-03 Glossary with domain terms and project-specific definitions.

Validate phase completion against checklist. Evaluates gate criteria and produces pass/fail report.
Living traceability matrix linking requirements to design and test artifacts across waterfall phases.
